localization.en: The item on the top is the priority.
Select policy to assign to a group and unselect to remove from the group.
Change and save option values. If this policy is already assigned, the assignment status will be impacted.
Are you sure to save this policy?
If this policy is already assigned, the assignment status will be impacted.
Are you sure you want to leave this page?
All unsaved changes will be lost.
Enter policy name and add a note.
Explore category and search to select policy settings.
Set selected policy setting options and go back to the previous step to add policy setting.
Assign this policy to device groups by selecting the Assignments tab and adding the policy to device groups.
